menu.newsletterPitch: The best way to stay up to date on THORChain

footer.riskTooltip: While this website is built with care it may have unintended bugs which may lead to site malfunctioning and even loss of funds. Proceed only if you understand and accept these risks.
footer.reportBug: Report a Bug / Request a Feature

bug.title: Report a Bug / Request a Feature
bug.success: Thank you! Your report has been sent.

confirm.sourceAddressTooltip: The wallet address sending the funds for this swap.
confirm.destinationAddressTooltip: The wallet address that will receive the swapped funds.
confirm.refundAddressTooltip: The address where funds will be returned if the swap cannot be completed.
confirm.limitPriceTooltip: The price per unit at which your limit order will execute. The order will only fill when the market reaches this price.
confirm.targetAmountTooltip: The exact amount you will receive when your limit order executes at your specified price.
confirm.minimumPayoutTooltip: This is the minimum you're guaranteed to receive at your {protection} price protection setting. If the market moves enough that you'd receive less, the swap is cancelled and refunded.
confirm.priceImpactTooltip: How much your swap moves the pool's price. The larger your swap relative to available liquidity, the higher the price impact.
confirm.slippageToleranceTooltip1: The difference between your {protection} price protection and the price impact.
confirm.slippageToleranceTooltip2: During the time between seeing a quote and your swap completing, prices can change. Slippage tolerance is the maximum price change you'll accept before the swap is cancelled.
confirm.includedFeesTooltip: These fees are already included in the rate — you don't pay them separately.

warning.highPriceImpact: I understand the price impact is in addition to the slippage tolerance. I accept the high price impact on this swap
warning.sendExact: I understand that I must send exactly the specified amount from a self-custody wallet. I understand that sending from a smart contract wallet, exchange address, delegated address, or an EIP 7702 wallet, will result in
warning.ltcMweb: I understand that using an LTC MWEB address will result in
warning.selfCustody: I understand that I must use a self-custody wallet. I understand that using a smart contract wallet, exchange address, delegated address, or an EIP 7702 wallet, will result in

instant.sendDescription: Send exactly {amount} {ticker} to the address below from a self custody wallet.

error.minAmountNoWallet: Minimum swap amount without a connected wallet is {amount} {ticker}

feeDialog.title: Fees Included in the Rate
feeDialog.description: These fees are already included in the rate — you don't pay them separately.
feeDialog.liquidityFeeInfo: Fee for liquidity providers on the route

limitCancel.descriptionModify: Modifying this limit order will update the target price. A small network fee will be charged to process the modification.
limitCancel.descriptionCancel: Cancelling this limit order will return your deposited funds to your wallet. A small network fee will be charged to process the cancellation.

toast.sendToCancel: Send {amount} {ticker} from the original wallet to cancel
toast.sendToModify: Send {amount} {ticker} from the original wallet to modify

warning.memolessDeposit: To {mode} this order, send the deposit from the original {chain} wallet that placed it
warning.connectOrMemoless: Connect a {chain} wallet or use the memoless deposit to {mode} this order
warning.connect: Connect a {chain} wallet to {mode} this order
warning.switch: Switch to a {chain} wallet to {mode} this order
warning.addressMismatch: Connected wallet does not match the address that placed this order

recipient.taprootNotSupported: Maya Protocol does not support Taproot addresses

settings.priceProtectionTooltip1: Price impact is how much your swap moves the pool's price. The larger your swap relative to available liquidity, the higher the impact.
settings.priceProtectionTooltip2: During the time between seeing a quote and your swap completing, prices can change. Slippage tolerance is the maximum price change you'll accept before the swap is cancelled.
settings.priceProtectionDescription: The most you are willing to spend on a swap. This includes the price impact of your swap and any slippage on the token prices before the swap is executed.
settings.twapTooltip1: TWAP trades on THORChain are called "streaming swaps" in the documents and code.
settings.twapTooltip2: To place an instant sell order, which will result in the worst price execution, enter 1 for the number of sub-swaps and 1 block for the time between sub-swaps.
settings.twapDescription: The vast majority of users should use the default settings. Only expert traders should change these settings
settings.numberOfSubSwapsTooltip: Break up your order into smaller trades called sub-swaps. The more sub-swaps, the better price execution. When set to zero, the protocol will calculate the number of sub-swaps for you so that each one will have a slippage of 5 bps. The default value is zero.
settings.timeBetweenSubSwapsTooltip: Time between each sub-swap measured in blocks. The more blocks between each sub-swap, the better the price execution. Choosing zero blocks will do multiple sub-swaps every block for faster execution. The default value is zero blocks.

beta.title: This is a beta feature
beta.description: There may be undiscovered bugs. Use at your own risk!

memo.title: Memo
memo.noPayloadInfo: This operation requires no payload. Only the 0.02 RUNE network fee applies.

stake.compoundInfo: Compound your pending TCY staking rewards back into your stake position.

pool.pairedAddressHint: External chain address for dual-sided add
pool.feeRange: Affiliate fee must be a whole number between 0 and 10000 bps.
pool.affiliatePair: Set both an affiliate and a fee, or leave both empty.
pool.inboundUnavailable: Inbound address unavailable for this chain.
pool.chainHalted: This chain is currently halted for liquidity actions.
pool.noPosition: No liquidity position found for this pool.
pool.singleSidedNote: Single-sided withdrawals are swapped to one asset on-chain; final amounts may differ due to slip and fees.
pool.noRunepoolPosition: No RUNEPool position found for this wallet.

thorname.lookupError: Couldn't check availability. Please try again.
thorname.name: Name
thorname.preferredAssetInfo: Affiliate fees earned by {name} are automatically swapped to the preferred asset and sent to its alias address on that chain.

wallet.ledgerUnlockHint: Make sure your Ledger is unlocked and the {app} app is open before connecting.
wallet.createWalletInstructions: Write these 12 words down and store them securely offline. This 12 word phrase is used to recover your wallet private keys.
wallet.confirmSavedPassphrase: I confirm I have securely saved the passphrase to recover my account in the future.
wallet.setupPasswordInstructions: Enter a strong password to encrypt your created wallet. This is how you will access your wallet.

error.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JSON or TXT file.

wallet.selectOrDragKeystore: Select or drag your keystore file to upload it
wallet.externalWalletModeDescription: Use a self custody wallet without connecting it to the website
wallet.externalWalletAssetUnsupported: This asset is not supported in External Wallet mode. Connect a browser wallet if you want to continue.
